summary: Full backend + frontend e2e testing of Gospel Roots Lawn Care marketing site. 7/7 pytest backend tests passed (health, quote create success, optional fields, 422 validation cases, list quotes). Frontend e2e via Playwright verified hero headline, 8 service cards (incl. Pressure Washing Coming Soon), navbar links, mobile menu toggle, Before/After slider interaction (drag changes divider), FAQ accordion expand, contact form submit → success card + toast, and footer.

minor.issue: logger.exception called inside except block but `logger` is defined later in module (line 119). If insert ever fails, this would raise NameError instead of returning 500. Not hit during normal runs but is latent bug. Move logging.basicConfig + logger assignment above route definitions.

integration_issues.issue: Empty submit triggers native HTML5 'required' validation (browser tooltip) before reaching JS handler. The toast.error('Please fill in name, email, phone and message.') path is therefore unreachable via UI. Either remove `required` attrs to let JS validation/toast run, or rely solely on HTML5 (current UX is acceptable but inconsistent with spec mentioning 'validation toast').

action_items: (Optional) Move `logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)` and `logging.basicConfig(...)` above route handlers in /app/backend/server.py to avoid latent NameError in the POST /api/quotes except block.
(Optional) Decide between HTML5 `required` validation and JS toast.error for empty contact form; current setup makes the toast path unreachable.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `logger` referenced inside POST /api/quotes except (line 91) but only defined at line 119 — latent NameError if insert ever fails.
server.py uses `@app.on_event('shutdown')` which is deprecated in FastAPI; consider lifespan handlers.
Contact.jsx uses both HTML5 `required` and JS validation; the JS branch is dead code under normal browser behavior.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all spec items verified; one minor UX inconsistency noted)

seed_data_creation: Created 2 test quote requests with TEST_ prefix in MongoDB (TEST_John Doe, TEST_Jane) via API during pytest run. No cleanup performed (no delete endpoint).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend public URL: https://gospel-lawn-pro.preview.emergentagent.com. All /api/* endpoints reachable. Pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_gospel_roots_api.py covers root + quotes CRUD/validation. Frontend data-testids present and stable: hero-cta-quote, hero-cta-services, service-card-1..8, ba-slider-1/2, faq-item-1..6, contact-form, contact-input-{name,email,phone,address,message}, contact-submit, contact-success. Mobile menu toggle is button[aria-label*='menu'] (no specific data-testid).
